headline: FIXED a real fkwu bug: the table flattener's float-literal lexer dropped scientific-notation exponents (1.5e-05 read as the mantissa ~1.5×10^? wrong). Now positional + mel-frame + conv-stem + transformer-gelu-erf cross four-way.

root_cause.where: form-stdlib/form-flatten.fk, flt-float-end — it consumed only the integer+fraction digits and STOPPED at 'e', so '9.999999983333325e-05' was lexed as the mantissa (~10) and 'e-05' became stray tokens. Only the fourth arm (fkwu) flattens through this path; Go/Rust/TS parse floats via the source-compiler, which handles exponents — hence three-way agreed and only fkwu diverged.

fix: flt-float-end now consumes a valid scientific-notation exponent (e/E, optional +/-, digits) into the literal substring; fk-f64 carries the full literal string and the walker's strtod parses it. A bare 'e' not followed by a valid exponent is left as a separate token (unchanged).

remaining_divergences.mel-full: fourth=0, three-way solid — a SEPARATE residual fkwu issue (NOT e-notation; the exact e-15 literals now cross). Likely nth over the long samples buffer or the spectrogram walk. Owned, tracked.
remaining_divergences.transformer-mh / transformer-decoder / t: RUST kernel computes the multi-head split/concat path ~6e-4 off (go=ts=numpy correct, rust wrong → fail THREE-WAY; fkwu errors -5). Separate Rust-kernel bug, owned, tracked.
remaining_divergences.note: the prior draft of the 2026-06-19 evidence wrongly called the fkwu issue a 'list-slicing divergence' — that was a PRINT ARTIFACT (the fourth arm compares the band's RETURN value). Bare-return testing found the real cause (this exponent bug) and the separate Rust bug.

methodology_lessons: The fourth arm compares the band's RETURN value — bands must end in a bare verdict expression, never (print x).
Read go/rust/ts/fkwu separately; 'kernels agree' with no fourth leg is not four-way.
Clear form-stdlib/.cache/fourth between exploratory runs — stale tables masquerade as divergences.
Validate three-way via validate.sh, never bin-go (Go) alone, before claiming a band is proven.
